reviews.review_description: As a fan of Lunar Lander this was an easy purchase, is still in very early stage with very few level, still not a scoring from level to level that sticks, you get stars and points but these are not shown anywhere. The editor is still very bare but functionals. This game has such a great potential if developed further and would be worth every penny. Dev should drop the starship-like part, is unecessaty and blunt, develop the core game parts and mechanics.
Unable to move to a new room after initial setup

If you love the classic Lunar Lander, you will love this. If you don't, you will still love it. Fantastic use of room scale mixed reality. Controls are simple to grasp but hard to master. Fantastic sound and music. Graphics fit the mood of the game perfectly. You even get to free roam around your room if you want. Recommended.

developer_response.body: Wow! thank you for the great review! glad you liked the game!

reviews.review_description:
This is an immersive and fun MR experience where your mission is to land satellites and rockets with precision onto narrow, often precarious platforms. The game features multiple modes that keep things fresh:
-Rocket Landing from deep space
- Satellite Drop while dodging meteorites
- A relaxing Free Roam Mode to explore and perfect your landings
The gameplay is smooth and engaging, with intuitive controls and a clean interface. It strikes a great balance between fun and challenge, and it’s incredibly well-priced for the amount of content and polish offered.
Highly recommended for fans of space, physics-based challenges, or anyone looking for a fresh MR concept on the Meta Quest platform!
Early access so we should get updates and new content in a short future. Great start!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the detailed review!

reviews.review_description: Really well done.  Glad I got it. Can't wait to see more added.

reviews.review_title: 5 Stars!! A Must Play VR Experience!
reviews.review_description:
I can’t recommend Space Lander enough! This game is an absolute gem on VR. From the moment you start, you’re drawn into a super immersive world where you can scan your entire room, making the experience feel incredibly real and personal.

The gameplay is smooth and responsive, with zero lag or clunky controls, just pure, fluent fun. It’s also refreshingly creative, blending classic space vibes with a modern competitive twist. Chasing high scores adds a whole new layer of excitement, and it’s the kind of game that keeps you coming back for “just one more go.

👏👏👏A👏 ROUND👏 OF 👏APPLAUSE👏 FOR OUR HARD WORKING CREATOR, RudyAA👏👏👏



  After playing the game for a couple of days, one of my continuously favorite aspects is space in my home! The safety of walls....the limitlesness of one's mind. 

  After my rocket enters the room, the countdown begins before I'm walking around and dodging asteroids to ensure my vision of my Astronauts safe journey to his next checkpoint. 

Please enjoy this game as much as I have been!

Very nice use of MR with great graphics and catchy soundtrack. Great game to drop in casually when you don't have a lot of time to play. I'm excited to see where the dev is going with this, but it's clear they know what they are doing in VR. Keep it coming!

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you so much for the feedback! So Glad you liked the game :)
